text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is right around the
corner! Fine Motion asks her roommate, Air
Groove, about the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, who has run that race herself,
explains that it's a proud and dignified race of
enormous significance, and a special event very
much befitting the word "queen" in its name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch a broadcast of the race with Fine Motion,
who is deeply moved by watching the runners vie
desperately for victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup—Fine Motion
commits the name to memory.
